/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/driver_nearsecvr.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,driver_nearsecvr.so -o driver_nearsecvr.so CMakeFiles/driver_nearsecvr.dir/driver_nearsec_vr.cpp.o   -L/home/fame/Documents/NearsecTogether/src/sidecar/input_backends/experimental/steamvr_driver/openvr/lib/linux64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/fame/Documents/NearsecTogether/src/sidecar/input_backends/experimental/steamvr_driver/openvr/lib/linux64 -lopenvr_api -lpthread
